visual: Nearly all weight on the rear bent leg while the front foot rests lightly with only the toe or heel touching the floor.
motion_description: From a posture with knees bent and both arms extended forward at shoulder height, the arms slowly press down to waist level. Simultaneously, weight shifts entirely onto the right leg as the left foot is drawn back slightly, resting lightly on the toes. The slow, continuous motion concludes as the left foot is placed flat beside the right, both legs straighten, and the arms lower to hang naturally at the sides with the torso remaining squarely forward.
